summary: [UI/UX][CI] Build & Test Run Page Header & Run Stepper
description:
In Scope

In this feature, we are covering the following:

  • Process Run page header:
    • Run Name
    • Process Status
    • Expiry tag
    • Run Details
      • The fields that are needed are the following:
        • General:
          • Template Name: the BP definition name
          • Activity Type: Process Type ex: Build & Test Process/Configuration Build & Test
          • Description: BP definition description (optional)
        • Config Parameters:
        • Build Scenario Definition
        • Infrastructure Parameters
          • Build Environment Infra Group
          • Test Environment Infra Group
    • Branch Details
      • Fields: same as the upgrade
    • Abort
  • Stepper migration
    • New New! We have the skip step option in the CI process: in the BP definition, the users have the option to skip the build env deployment, in this case, we have to show 
    • The rest is similar to what was done in the upgrade process

parent_chain.summary: [UI/UX][CI] Build & Test Run Page Header & Run Stepper
